title: Adaptive Waveform Inversion Guidance
summary: Adaptive waveform inversion can be considered when conventional waveform-difference FWI is vulnerable to cycle skipping.
assumptions: observed and synthetic data can be compared through an adaptive matching filter
cycle-skipping risk is diagnosed before switching the objective

parameter_advice.misfit_function: Use AWI-style objectives when waveform-difference FWI is likely to compare events that are more than half a cycle apart.
parameter_advice.matching_filter_length: Start with a conservative matching-filter window and inspect whether the recovered filter concentrates near zero lag.
parameter_advice.frequency_band: Pair AWI with the lowest reliable frequencies first, then compare against a multi-scale FWI baseline.
